---
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: false
execute:
  cache: false
  echo: false
  warnings: false
  error: false
---

```{r}
#| results: "asis"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
source("../../_common.R")
status(type = "drafting")
```

## Material and methods for resistance in humans {#sec-mmh}

Text here...
